title: Connect boards column - Linking two-way connection after initial creation
excerpt:
Description
The two-way connection of the connect boards column is such a helpful feature, but it’s limited to when the first connection is created. So when there’s a malfunction and the two-way connection gets unlinked …

posts.author: yjeong (EJ)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The two-way connection of the connect boards column is such a helpful feature, but it’s limited to when the first connection is created. So when there’s a malfunction and the two-way connection gets unlinked somehow… It’s a tedious problem to try to fix. If this automatic two-way connection could be available if two boards are already linking to each other, it’d be perfection!

What are you trying to achieve

The automatic two-way connection for the connect boards column to be available if the connect boards column link two boards to each other already

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

You could try our Mirror Item Multiple Boards app!

We have a connect boards auto-fill feature.

Anytime a new item is created on Board 1, it will be automatically added to board 2 and the connect board column will be pre-filled.

Other features of our app include -

  • Adding the same item to multiple boards with real-time sync
  • Complete Updates + Replies sync
  • Subitems are supported too. A new subitem created on the original item, wilI be auto-created on the linked item

Centralize your designs (9)1920×960 209 KB

Basically you can mirror your item with complete context, giving you the option of not using connect boards or mirror columns altogether. But the auto-fill feature is anyway present!

Feel free to reach out to us at support@fortimus.co or book a demo here

posts.author: Tom-CXmonday (Tom)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello @yjeong ! Tom from monday Glad to let you know that we recently released an update to our connect boards column, and they now include the ability to turn a 1-way connection to 2-way, here’s the full info: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000635139-The-Connect-Boards-Column
